meta.title: Agency 99 – AI Automation, Systems & Web
meta.description: We build AI automations, robust systems, and websites that convert. Based in Estonia, working globally.

footer.tagline: Automations that ship. Systems that hold. Websites that convert.

hero.headline: Automations that ship. Systems that hold. Websites that convert.
hero.sub: We design and build the infrastructure that makes your operation faster, smarter, and more leveraged. No fluff. Just things that work.

what.headline: Three disciplines. One studio.
what.sub: Each engagement lives at the intersection of automation, systems thinking, and web craft.

items.label: AI Automations
items.desc: Multi-step workflows that eliminate manual overhead. Data pipelines, trigger-based actions, and AI-assisted decision layers that run while you sleep.

items.label: Systems
items.desc: Internal tooling, dashboards, and operational infrastructure. Built to last and scale without constant babysitting or technical debt.

items.label: Web
items.desc: Conversion-focused websites and apps that are fast, accessible, and built with clear intent—not pulled from a template directory.

automationMap.headline: Every automation follows a pattern.
automationMap.sub: Click any node to see what we build at each stage.

input.label: Input
input.title: Data Ingestion
input.desc: Structured triggers from forms, APIs, webhooks, databases, or scheduled crons that kick off the flow reliably.
input.outcome: Zero manual triggers needed. Inputs arrive from anywhere your data already lives.

process.label: Process
process.title: Processing & Enrichment
process.desc: Raw inputs are cleaned, enriched, classified, or transformed using custom logic or AI models before any action is taken.
process.outcome: Clean, structured data ready for downstream action—no spreadsheet gymnastics.

decide.label: Decide
decide.title: Decision Layer
decide.desc: Rules, conditions, and model outputs route each item to the correct outcome without human intervention at every step.
decide.outcome: Consistent, auditable decision-making at scale, 24 hours a day.

act.label: Act
act.title: Action Execution
act.desc: Write to databases, update records, generate documents, send messages, or trigger downstream systems automatically.
act.outcome: The right thing happens automatically—every single time, without prompting.

notify.label: Notify
notify.title: Alerts & Reporting
notify.desc: Summaries, exception alerts, and status updates delivered to the right people at exactly the right time.
notify.outcome: Stay informed without constant monitoring. Only get pinged when it actually matters.

packages.headline: Pick your scope.
packages.sub: All packages include discovery, design, build, and a structured handover session.

items.name: Build
items.desc: A full system or site built end-to-end.

items.name: Partner
items.desc: Ongoing build capacity and strategic input.

steps.label: Audit
steps.desc: We map your existing workflow, identify bottlenecks, and scope the build.

steps.label: Blueprint
steps.desc: Architecture, data flow, and component design—agreed before a line of code.

steps.label: Build
steps.desc: Iterative delivery. You see progress every week.

steps.label: Ship
steps.desc: Staged release, QA, and handover with documentation.

steps.label: Iterate
steps.desc: Post-launch improvements driven by real usage and feedback.

roi.headline: See the math.
roi.sub: A rough estimate. Your actual savings will usually be higher.
roi.disclaimer: This is an estimate based on reported automation coverage averages. Actual results depend on process complexity and automation depth.

items.q: Do you work with clients outside Estonia?
items.a: Yes. Most of our clients are remote. We work async-first with weekly or bi-weekly syncs. Time zone overlap isn't a hard requirement.

items.q: We're not technical. Can we still work together?
items.a: Yes. We translate complexity into plain outcomes. You don't need to understand the stack—you need to understand the result, and we make sure you do.
Usually within 1–2 weeks of a signed agreement. Sprint projects can sometimes start sooner depending on current capacity.

items.q: What if the project scope changes mid-build?
items.a: Scope changes happen. We flag them early, assess impact, and agree before proceeding. There are no surprise invoices.

items.q: Do you maintain what you build?
items.a: Sprint and Build packages include a support window. For ongoing maintenance and continuous iteration, the Partner package is the right fit.

cta.headline: Ready to move?
cta.sub: Tell us what you're trying to fix. We'll tell you if we can help.

for.label: This is for you if:
items: You're losing hours to manual, repeatable work
You need a system that scales without constant hiring
You want a website built with intent, not a template
You move fast and expect the same from who you hire

notFor.label: This isn't for you if:
items: You have no defined outcome or problem to solve
You expect a waterfall process with monthly status reports
You want someone to manage your existing tools for you

work.headline: Work that shipped.
work.sub: A selection of builds across automation, systems, and web.
work.similarChallenge: Have a similar challenge? Let's talk.

services.headline: What we do.
services.sub: Three disciplines with one shared standard: built to work, built to last.

items.label: AI Automations
items.desc: We design and build end-to-end automation pipelines that eliminate manual overhead across your operation. From simple triggers to complex AI-assisted decision flows.

items.label: Systems
items.desc: Internal tooling, dashboards, and operational systems that give your team leverage. We build the things that make your core business run better without needing more headcount.
outcomes: Full operational visibility in one place
Systems that scale with your team
No vendor lock-in or black-box tools

items.label: Web
items.desc: Performance-first websites and landing pages built for conversion and clarity. We handle strategy, design, and build—so the output reflects your positioning, not a template.
outcomes: Sub-2s load times on all devices
Copy and structure that earns trust

services.notSureText: Not sure which service fits? Tell us the problem—we'll figure out the right approach together.

process.headline: Five steps. No surprises.
process.sub: Every project follows the same structure. You know where you are at every stage.

steps.label: Audit
steps.desc: We start by understanding your current state. What's working, what isn't, where the time and money is leaking. This shapes everything that comes after.

steps.label: Blueprint
steps.desc: Before a line of code, we agree on architecture. Data flows, component structure, integrations, and edge cases—all documented and signed off.

steps.label: Build
steps.desc: Iterative development with weekly check-ins. You see real progress every week—not a big reveal at the end. Feedback is incorporated as we go.
details: Scope change flagging in real time

steps.label: Ship
steps.desc: Staged release, final QA, and a structured handover. You get documentation, a walkthrough session, and everything you need to operate what we built.

steps.label: Iterate
steps.desc: The best systems improve after launch. We offer structured post-launch support and iteration cycles based on real usage, data, and feedback.

contact.headline: Tell us about your project.
contact.sub: We read every message and respond within one business day.

form.name: Full name
form.message: What are you trying to solve?
form.messagePlaceholder: Describe the problem you're trying to solve...

thanks.headline: Message received.
thanks.sub: We'll get back to you within one business day. In the meantime, check out our recent work.

sections.title: Information we collect
sections.body: We collect information you provide directly when you use our contact form, including your name, email address, company name, and project details. We do not collect data through cookies or tracking scripts.

sections.title: How we use your information
sections.body: We use the information you provide solely to respond to your enquiry and, if you become a client, to deliver our services. We do not sell, rent, or share your data with third parties for marketing purposes.

sections.title: Data retention
sections.body: We retain contact information for as long as necessary to fulfil the purpose for which it was collected. You may request deletion of your data at any time by contacting us at hello@agency99.ee.

sections.title: Your rights
sections.body: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, or erase your personal data. You also have the right to object to processing and to data portability. To exercise these rights, contact us at hello@agency99.ee.

sections.title: Acceptance of terms
sections.body: By engaging Agency 99 for services, you agree to these terms. A formal engagement begins with a signed proposal or statement of work.

sections.title: Services
sections.body: Agency 99 provides AI automation, systems building, and web development services as described in each project's scope of work. Deliverables and timelines are agreed in writing before work begins.

sections.title: Payment
sections.body: Payment terms are outlined in each project agreement. Invoices are due within 14 days of issue unless otherwise agreed in writing.

sections.title: Intellectual property
sections.body: Upon full payment, clients receive ownership of all custom code and assets created for their project. Agency 99 retains the right to display work in its portfolio unless agreed otherwise.

sections.title: Limitation of liability
sections.body: Agency 99's liability is limited to the value of the relevant project agreement. We are not liable for indirect or consequential damages arising from use of our deliverables.
